creator: kenji@k2r.org
text:
Confirmed the port was removed from the Ports tree on 2011-05-11.
Thanks for letting me know.

On Tue, Oct 29, 2013 at 6:48 PM, Tijl Coosemans <tijl@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Hi,
>
> There's no port www/indexme in the ports tree.  Can you double check the
> spelling?  Maybe this only exists on your local systems?
